home.heroSubtitle: Set custom price alerts for Chinese A-share stocks. Get instant push notifications when your rules trigger. Powered by real-time data from QQ Finance.
home.featuresSubtitle: Professional stock monitoring tools in your pocket
home.feature1Desc: Set price change %, target price, and volume spike alerts. Get notified exactly when you need to act.
home.feature2Desc: Sign in securely with biometric passkeys or magic links. No passwords to remember or leak.
home.feature3Desc: Instant browser push notifications when your stock rules trigger. Never miss a move.
home.feature4Desc: Live stock quotes from QQ Finance covering all Shanghai, Shenzhen, and Beijing exchanges.
home.feature5Desc: Automated checks every 5 minutes during A-share trading hours (9:30-11:30, 13:00-15:00).
home.feature6Desc: Full log of all triggered alerts. Review past notifications and track your monitoring accuracy.
home.ctaDesc: Set up your first stock alert in under a minute. No credit card required.

dashboard.noAlertsLine2: Search and add stocks above to get started.

form.title: Add Stock Alert
form.description: Search for a stock and set notification rules
form.descPriceChange: Notify when price changes by this percentage (%)
form.descPriceTarget: Notify when price reaches this target value (¥)
form.descVolumeSpike: Notify when volume exceeds this multiple of average (×)

push.title: Push Notifications
push.enabledDesc: You will receive notifications on this device.
push.disabledDesc: Enable push notifications to get instant alerts.
push.testSuccessContext: If you saw the notification, everything is working correctly.
push.notSupportedDesc: Your browser doesn't support push notifications.
push.iosTip: iOS Users: For the best experience and to receive notifications, please add this app to your Home Screen.
